sentences.target: On parle d'un otage à la télévision.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl dœ̃ ɔtaʒ a la televizjɔ̃/

translations.fr: On parle d'un otage à la télévision.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl dœ̃ ɔtaʒ a la televizjɔ̃/
translations.en: They're talking about a hostage on TV.
translations.es: Están hablando de un rehén en la tele.
translations.de: Im Fernsehen sprechen sie über eine Geisel.
translations.it: In televisione parlano di un ostaggio.
translations.pt: Estão falando de um refém na TV.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về một con tin trên TV.
translations.ar: إنهم يتحدثون عن رهينة على التلفاز.
translations.nl: Op tv praten ze over een gijzelaar.
translations.hi: टीवी पर एक बंधक के बारे में बात हो रही है.
translations.el: Στην τηλεόραση μιλάνε για έναν όμηρο.
translations.nb: På TV snakker de om en gissel.
translations.id: Di TV mereka membicarakan seorang sandera.
translations.sv: På tv pratar de om en gisslan.
translations.ro: La televizor vorbesc despre un ostatic.
translations.da: I tv taler de om en gidsel.
translations.ja: テレビで人質のことを話している。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (3rd person singular); generic subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular), agreeing with ‘On’.
Preposition ‘de’ elided before a vowel; introduces the complement ‘un otage’.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘otage’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘d’.’
Preposition introducing a locative phrase (‘à la télévision’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘télévision’.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘à’.

translations.en: I'm a hostage to the roadworks.
translations.he: אני בן ערובה של העבודות בכביש.
translations.vi: Tôi bị mắc kẹt vì công trình sửa đường.
translations.nl: Ik zit vast door de wegwerkzaamheden.
translations.hi: मैं सड़क के काम की वजह से फँसा हुआ हूँ.
translations.el: Είμαι όμηρος των έργων στον δρόμο.
translations.sv: Jag är fast på grund av vägarbetet.
translations.ro: Sunt blocat din cauza lucrărilor rutiere.
translations.ja: 工事のせいで身動きが取れない。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (1st person singular); subject of ‘suis’.
Copular auxiliary ‘être’, present indicative (1st person singular); links subject to predicate noun.
Common noun, masculine; predicate nominal/complement of the copula.
Contraction of ‘de + le’; preposition introducing the genitive complement ‘chantier’.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘du’.

sentences.target: Un otage a été libéré ce matin.
sentences.reading: /œ̃ ɔtaʒ a ete libeʁe sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Un otage a été libéré ce matin.
translations.ipa: /œ̃ ɔtaʒ a ete libeʁe sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: A hostage was freed this morning.
translations.es: Un rehén fue liberado esta mañana.
translations.de: Heute Morgen wurde eine Geisel freigelassen.
translations.it: Un ostaggio è stato liberato questa mattina.
translations.ko: 오늘 아침 인질 한 명이 석방됐어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上有一名人质被释放了。
translations.yue: 今朝早釋放咗一名人質。
translations.pt: Um refém foi libertado esta manhã.
translations.tr: Bu sabah bir rehine serbest bırakıldı.
translations.vi: Sáng nay một con tin đã được thả tự do.
translations.ar: تم الإفراج عن رهينة هذا الصباح.
translations.hu: Ma reggel szabadon engedtek egy túszt.
translations.hi: आज सुबह एक बंधक रिहा किया गया.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί απελευθερώθηκε ένας όμηρος.
translations.nb: I morges ble en gissel løslatt.
translations.sv: I morse släpptes en gisslan fri.
translations.ro: În această dimineață a fost eliberat un ostatic.
translations.da: I morges blev en gidsel løsladt.
translations.ja: 今朝、人質が一人解放された。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, masculine; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary ‘avoir’, present indicative (3rd person singular); forms the perfect/passive periphrasis.
Past participle of ‘être’ used as auxiliary to build the passive (‘a été’).
Past participle of the main lexical verb in passive voice; agrees with the subject (masculine singular).
Demonstrative determiner; modifies ‘matin’ to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine; temporal complement (‘ce matin’).

sentences.target: Tu me prends pour un otage.

translations.fr: Tu me prends pour un otage.
translations.en: You're treating me like a hostage.
translations.es: Me tratas como si fuera un rehén.
translations.de: Du behandelst mich wie eine Geisel.
translations.ru: Ты обращаешься со мной как с заложником.
translations.pt: Você está me tratando como um refém.
translations.he: אתה מתייחס אליי כמו אל בן ערובה.
translations.vi: Bạn đối xử với tôi như con tin vậy.
translations.nl: Je behandelt me alsof ik een gijzelaar ben.
translations.uk: Ти поводишся зі мною як із заручником.
translations.hu: Úgy bánsz velem, mintha túsz lennék.
translations.hi: तुम मेरे साथ ऐसे पेश आ रहे हो जैसे मैं कोई बंधक हूँ.
translations.el: Με αντιμετωπίζεις σαν να ήμουν όμηρος.
translations.nb: Du behandler meg som en gissel.
translations.sv: Du behandlar mig som en gisslan.
translations.ro: Mă tratezi de parcă aș fi un ostatic.
translations.cs: Zacházíš se mnou jako s rukojmím.
translations.da: Du behandler mig, som om jeg var en gidsel.
translations.ja: 人質みたいに扱ってる。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun (2nd person singular); subject of ‘prends’.
Clitic object pronoun (1st person singular), direct object of ‘prends’ placed before the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular).
Preposition; part of the construction ‘prendre [qn] pour [qc]’ indicating ascription.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘otage’.
Common noun, masculine; predicative complement of ‘prendre … pour’.
